Provenance.drafts: 4 candidates generated locally via ComfyUI MCP (single pass, no escalation needed); curated per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: c0 (seed+0) -- full-body standing pose, thorny bramble-vine texture across its back, big soft eyes, tiny tusks; clean single subject. c1 was cuter/rounder but read more mossy-crown than thorny-vine; c2 leaned feral/less charming; c3 drew an anthropomorphized clothed boar-person bust (the known character-sheet/anthropomorphize attractor for creature nouns) -- rejected.
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse, background-removed via BiRefNet (cutout.py --trim); normal map derived via normalmap.py (Sobel height-from-luminance, strength 2.5) -- lit Monster world sprite per AssetSpec.NormalMap=true. Normal-map QA: normalmap.py (Sobel height-from-luminance, strength 2.5) and the Flip-Y-OFF import convention are unchanged from the prior passing waves (P006 U1/U4-U6); this wave's windowed pilot-scene sweep directly verified 6 representative samples (gloomwood-old-mossjaw, gloomwood-toll-booth, sunkencrypt-undertow, sunkencrypt-crypt-crab, props-noticeboard, props-tavern-cat) with no inversion/caving on any -- no per-asset regression risk since the script and import setting are both untouched.
